summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin and Vendor Dashboard features for Black Star Threads eCommerce Phase 1. All 30 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI features verified working correctly.

backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard - Revenue stats with 15% commission calculation
GET /api/admin/analytics/vendors - Vendor earnings data with commission breakdown
GET /api/admin/orders - Orders with delivery confirmation tracking
PUT /api/vendor/orders/{order_id}/status - Update order status (processing, shipped, delivered)
Access Control: Vendor cannot access admin dashboard (403)
Access Control: Vendor cannot access admin analytics (403)
Access Control: Unauthenticated cannot access vendor dashboard (401)
frontend: Admin Dashboard loads successfully
Admin Dashboard - Total Revenue stat displayed
Admin Dashboard - Platform Commission (15%) stat displayed
Admin Dashboard - Vendor Earnings stat displayed
Admin Dashboard - Confirmed Deliveries stat displayed
Admin Dashboard - Vendors & Earnings tab with vendor analytics
Admin Dashboard - View Products button for each vendor
Admin Dashboard - Voting Panel tab (view-only) with jersey voting statistics
Admin Dashboard - Orders tab with Confirmed column
Vendor Dashboard loads successfully
Vendor Dashboard - Total Revenue stat displayed
Vendor Dashboard - Platform Fee (15%) stat displayed
Vendor Dashboard - Net Earnings stat displayed
Vendor Dashboard - Pending Payout stat displayed
Vendor Dashboard - Paid Out stat displayed
Vendor Dashboard - Add New Jersey button opens product creation modal
Vendor Dashboard - Orders tab
Vendor Dashboard - Products tab with Edit, Duplicate, Pause, Delete buttons
Vendor Dashboard - Promos tab with Create Promo button
Vendor Dashboard - Support tab with Contact Support, Seller Guidelines, Payout Policy

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Admin and Vendor Dashboard features are fully implemented and tested. Admin dashboard shows revenue stats with 15% platform commission, vendor analytics with earnings breakdown, view-only voting panel, and orders with delivery confirmation tracking. Vendor dashboard shows financial overview (revenue, commission, net earnings, payouts), order management with status updates, product management (add/edit/duplicate/pause/delete), promo code creation, and support section. All backend APIs are working correctly with proper access control. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_vendor_dashboards.py
